seo.title: Invoicemonk vs Atoinvoice — Best GST Invoice Software for India (2026)
seo.description: Compare Invoicemonk and Atoinvoice for Indian businesses. GST compliance, CGST/SGST/IGST support, UPI payments, and free invoicing — see which is best in 2026.

hero.title: Invoicemonk vs Atoinvoice
hero.subtitle: A detailed comparison for Indian businesses looking for the best GST-compliant invoicing software in 2026.

overview: Atoinvoice has been a popular choice among Indian small businesses and freelancers for basic GST invoice generation. However, as businesses grow and need more robust features — multi-currency support, expense tracking, recurring billing, and proper accounting — many users find themselves looking for alternatives.

Invoicemonk is built as a full invoicing and accounting platform, not just an invoice generator. It supports GST compliance out of the box with CGST, SGST, and IGST calculations, GSTIN fields, HSN/SAC codes, and generates invoices that meet all GST requirements. Beyond invoicing, it includes expense tracking, client management, receipt scanning, and financial reporting — all features that Atoinvoice doesn't offer.

For Indian businesses specifically, Invoicemonk supports INR billing with Indian payment methods including UPI and Razorpay integration. The free tier includes unlimited invoicing with GST fields, making it a genuine free alternative to Atoinvoice with significantly more functionality.

invoicemonk.title: Invoicemonk Pricing (India)
invoicemonk.note: All plans include GST-compliant invoicing, expenses, and accounting. No per-client limits on paid plans. INR billing available.

competitor.title: Atoinvoice Pricing
competitor.note: Basic invoice generation only. No expense tracking, accounting, or client management features.

migration.title: How to switch from Atoinvoice to Invoicemonk

steps.title: Create your free Invoicemonk account
steps.desc: Sign up at app.invoicemonk.com. Set up your business profile with GSTIN, logo, and default GST rates.

steps.title: Add your clients
steps.desc: Enter your client details including their GSTIN numbers. Invoicemonk stores client information for quick re-use on future invoices.

steps.title: Configure your GST settings
steps.desc: Set your default CGST, SGST, and IGST rates. Add your HSN/SAC codes for the products and services you sell.

steps.title: Create your first GST invoice
steps.desc: Use Invoicemonk's professional templates with automatic GST calculations. Download as PDF or send directly to clients.

steps.title: Explore additional features
steps.desc: Set up recurring invoices, track expenses, scan receipts, and use the accounting dashboard — features unavailable in Atoinvoice.

items.question: Is there an atoinvoice alternative for India?
items.answer: Yes. Invoicemonk is a comprehensive atoinvoice alternative built for Indian businesses. It includes everything Atoinvoice offers — GST-compliant invoice generation with CGST, SGST, and IGST — plus expense tracking, client management, recurring billing, accounting, and multi-currency support. The free tier lets you start immediately with no signup fees.

items.question: Does Invoicemonk support Indian GST?
items.answer: Absolutely. Invoicemonk fully supports Indian GST compliance including CGST, SGST, IGST, and cess calculations. You can add your GSTIN, HSN/SAC codes, and the system auto-calculates tax breakdowns on every invoice. Generated invoices meet all GST requirements for filing and compliance.

items.question: Is Invoicemonk free like Atoinvoice?
items.answer: Yes. Invoicemonk's free tier includes unlimited invoicing with full GST support, expense tracking, and basic accounting. Unlike Atoinvoice which only generates invoices, Invoicemonk's free plan gives you a complete business management toolkit.

items.question: Can I use UPI or Razorpay with Invoicemonk?
items.answer: Yes. Invoicemonk integrates with Indian payment methods including UPI and Razorpay, allowing your clients to pay invoices directly. Payment status syncs automatically with your invoice records.

items.question: Does Invoicemonk support e-invoicing for India?
items.answer: Invoicemonk generates GST-compliant invoices that meet all Indian tax authority requirements. For businesses above the e-invoicing threshold, invoices include all mandatory fields required for e-invoice registration on the GST portal.

items.question: Best free invoicing software in India?
items.answer: Invoicemonk is among the best free invoicing software for Indian businesses in 2026. It offers GST compliance, multi-currency support, expense tracking, and professional templates — all on the free tier. Unlike basic generators like Atoinvoice, it's a full business platform that grows with your business.

items.question: Can I generate invoices in INR with proper formatting?
items.answer: Yes. Invoicemonk supports INR (₹) with proper Indian number formatting. You can also invoice international clients in USD, GBP, EUR, and other currencies from the same account.
